name: Session Resume and Progress Save - Integration
description: Tests the integration between ChatSessionManager and ProgressPersistenceService for session resumption and progress saving.
input: Start a session, then update and save progress, then resume the session.
output: Session data is correctly persisted and retrieved.
success_criteria: Session data after resume matches the last saved state
AuditLogger logs SESSION_START, PROGRESS_SAVE, and SESSION_RESUME events
error_scenarios: Attempt to resume a non-existent session
